phase.title: Portfolio integration baseline
phase.goal: Monorepo alignment, CLI docs, embed boundaries, preview uploads, route-installer cleanup.

phase.title: Package host contract
phase.goal: Cleaner package-level host contract for other apps to import.

phase.title: Live cockpit
phase.goal: Real cockpit body, Pack vs Live modes, shared bundle plumbing, dashboard chrome.

phase.title: Workflow loop
phase.goal: Sprint-aware snapshot scoring, kickoff scaffolding, done gates, ownership guidance.

phase.title: Structured cockpit views
phase.goal: Form-based editing, badges, icons, autosave, immutable ids, host policy controls.

phase.title: GAD migration
phase.goal: Replace rp-* skills with gad: equivalents, init project under GAD framework, remove legacy session.md pattern.
